description: SEV1 cascading production outage affecting multiple critical services. Several events occurring simultaneously make diagnosis challenging. You must carefully investigate, identify the true root cause, remediate correctly, and document thoroughly.

initial_alerts.message: Authentication failures at 70% -- users cannot log in
Order creation completely failing -- 100% error rate
Config refresh failing -- cannot reach config backend
Scheduled elasticsearch reindex started at 19:55 -- expected higher latency
Model v4.2 deployment started -- canary rollout in progress

root_cause.description: internal-dns v3.0.0 deployment at 19:30 contained a corrupted zone file that dropped/corrupted several critical *.internal DNS records (order-db.internal, payment-db.internal, config-db.internal, auth-cache.internal). Services using DNS-based discovery lost connectivity to their databases and backing stores. Red herrings: recommendation-engine latency (unrelated model update) and search-api latency (unrelated elasticsearch reindex) are coincidental.
